scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "console.error('Do not publish the monorepo root. Run: cd packages/cli && npm publish --access public'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.docker:builder: docker buildx inspect localbase-builder >/dev/null 2>&1 || docker buildx create --name localbase-builder --driver docker-container --use
scripts.docker:publish:api: pnpm docker:builder && docker buildx build --builder localbase-builder --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -f apps/api/Dockerfile -t mananchataut/localbase-api:latest --push .
scripts.docker:publish:mcp: pnpm docker:builder && docker buildx build --builder localbase-builder --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -f apps/mcp/Dockerfile -t mananchataut/localbase-mcp:latest --push .
